landing.heroSubheadline: Basiret AI - Your Arabic/English AI Platform
landing.heroTitle: Know your audience. Grow your business.
landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered Instagram analytics with full Arabic and English support. Understand sentiment, segment your audience, and get actionable recommendations.
landing.recommendationText: Post Reels on Tuesdays — 3.2x more reach
landing.pillAnalyze: AI analyzes your posts, engagement patterns, and audience behavior automatically.
landing.problemSubtext: Turn raw Instagram data into clear, actionable insights — automatically.
landing.pillAnalyzeDesc: Increasing the number of followers and engagement on each of your posts.
landing.cardSentimentDesc: AI-powered analysis for Arabic and English content with real-time scoring.
landing.cardRecommDesc: Get AI suggestions on what to post, when to post, and which hashtags drive engagement.
landing.cardRecommFooter: Powered by BASIRET AI Engine — analyzing engagement patterns across your accounts.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need to grow on Instagram
landing.featuresSubheading: From sentiment analysis to content recommendations — powered by AI that understands Arabic and English.
landing.featureSentimentDesc: Understand how your audience feels about your content. Our multilingual NLP pipeline analyzes captions and comments in both Arabic and English with 85%+ accuracy.
landing.featureSegmentationDesc: Automatically cluster your audience into meaningful segments using K-means analysis on engagement patterns.
landing.featurePostsDesc: Deep analysis of every post — including OCR text extraction from images and carousels.
landing.featureRecommendationsDesc: Get AI-powered suggestions on what to post, when to post, and which hashtags to use.
landing.pricingSubheading: Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

sentiment.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentiment.insightGreat: Share your best reviewed post as a story
sentiment.insightGreatDesc: Your positive sentiment is above 60%. Amplify this by resharing your top-rated content to stories.
sentiment.insightCta: Add a call-to-action to your captions
sentiment.insightCtaDesc: Over 50% of your posts receive neutral sentiment. Adding clear CTAs can increase engagement and positive reactions.
sentiment.insightConcernDesc: Negative sentiment is above 30%. Responding to concerns publicly can improve perception and build trust.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.rec1Title: Post more Reels on weekday mornings
recommendations.rec1Desc: Your video content gets significantly higher engagement than images. Posting Reels during weekday mornings maximizes reach.
recommendations.rec1Data: Reels avg 3x more reach than images
recommendations.rec2Desc: Replying to comments quickly boosts the algorithm's ranking of your post and encourages more interaction.
recommendations.rec3Title: Use carousel posts for educational content
recommendations.rec3Desc: Carousel posts have higher save rates. Use them for tips, tutorials, and educational content your audience values.

competitorsPage.headerSubtitle: How the market is moving around you — and where the openings are
competitorsPage.heroHeadline: Your competitors are leaning into short video — you're 25% behind
competitorsPage.heroBody: @raid_co posted a before/after reel that hit 3× their average. The same format gave you your best engagement last week — repeat it before the market saturates.

competitorsPage.activitySubtitle: Their recent posts with a tailored recommendation
competitorsPage.hashtagsSubtitle: They use these more than you

feed.post1Why: This format gave you your best engagement too

feed.post6Why: A recurring format that works for them — try your version

trendsPage.headerSubtitle: What's moving in your industry and city — opportunities before they saturate
trendsPage.hashtagsSubtitle: Highest momentum across the MENA F&B market this week
trendsPage.formatTrendsSubtitle: Which formats are gaining vs losing steam
trendsPage.formatVideoBody: Reels under 30s are pulling 2.1× the average engagement of static images this month — favoured especially in the 18–34 segment.
trendsPage.formatCarouselBody: Carousels with 7+ slides have lost 18% of their typical save-rate. 3–4 slide carousels still perform; cap the length.
trendsPage.heatmapSubtitle: Peak engagement hours across the market — last 14 days
trendsPage.heatmapPeak: Peak: {{slot}} — most accounts go quiet before 10am
trendsPage.calendarSubtitle: Upcoming moments worth planning for — sorted by proximity
trendsPage.macroSubtitle: Regulation, prices, and research that shape your content
trendsPage.noAngles: No specific angle yet — explore manually.

trends.t1Why: #desert_night hashtags rose 4× in 7 days — and your competitors' posts on this idea outperform by 2.7×
trends.t1Angle1: Photos under the stars at your outdoor venue
trends.t1Angle2: Customer interview: why come after sunset?
trends.t1Angle3: Carousel: 5 drinks that suit a late-night vibe
trends.t2Sub: 2026 buyers want the breakdown before purchase
trends.t2Why: Posts that explain pricing rose 150% in engagement after the inflation chatter wave on X.
trends.t2Angle1: Cost breakdown of a single coffee
trends.t2Angle2: 30s video: bean's journey from farm to cup
trends.t2Angle3: Short post: why our price is higher than the rest
trends.t3Why: #saudi_matcha posts doubled — your 24–34 audience is hunting for non-generic blends
trends.t3Angle2: Reel: trying matcha with Arabic coffee
trends.t4Why: Search dropped 42% this month. If you planned for it, postpone.
trends.c1Why: Coffee with national flavors hit 3× engagement in 2025. Ideal prep window: now → Sep 10.
trends.c1Angle1: Limited menu: 3 drinks in flag colors
trends.c1Angle2: Video: your coffee's story from Saudi growers
trends.c2Why: Audience movement rises 40% during the season. Posts about venues near events outperform.
trends.c2Angle1: Quick guide: cafés walkable from Boulevard
trends.c2Angle2: Carousel: plan your night in the season
trends.c3Why: Cold-drink and cooling content jumps 120% during heat peaks. Greenlit now.
trends.c3Angle1: Video: an iced drink in 30 seconds
trends.c3Angle2: Poll: coldest drink on the menu
trends.c4Why: Live-streaming traffic in cafés doubles on match days. Watch-party offers lead.
trends.c4Angle1: Announce your big screen at the café
trends.m1Why: New requirement to list bean country-of-origin on the menu. Competitors are prepping. Be the first to talk to your audience about it.
trends.m1Angle1: Educational post: where our beans come from
trends.m1Angle2: Carousel: origin map at 3 zoom levels
trends.m2Why: Pricing-transparency posts get 2.4× the average engagement during inflation waves. Explain before others speak for you.
trends.m2Angle1: Post: how we hold price without cutting quality
trends.m2Angle2: Short reel: the bean's trip from São Paulo to your cup
trends.m3Why: Long-term trend. Use it as a foundation for ongoing educational content, not a one-shot campaign.
trends.m3Angle1: Series "What's the difference?": specialty vs commercial
trends.m3Angle2: Weekly carousel: try a new tasting method
